race.comment: Tricky race with plenty of chances. HIEF OF WAR (2) massive improver at his third race start with a slashing second over 1175m at this track. Extra trip in his favour and sure to be thereabouts. ETCHED IN BLUE (11) resumes today with the two solid 1000m jump outs under his belt. Finished second over this track and trip three back last December. Each way player from the good gate. MR MAGNIFICENCE (6) lightly raced Castelvecchio gelding with the upside to win this second-up. Sat on the good tempo and found the 1200m too sharp when second over 1200m at Moruya on May 10. Shouldn't be a Maiden for long. BURNING ISSUES (18) drops sharply in weight at his third run back after finishing a respectable fourth over 1175m at this track. Ready for the extra ground and maps well.
